email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Marketingmedewerker bij VIVALDIS. Uw klant in Lummen, gespecialiseerd in online wijnverkoop, spreekt me enorm aan.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik zelfstandig marketingcampagnes uit: van SEO-optimalisatie en contentcreatie tot het bouwen en beheren van WordPress-sites. Ik coördineer projecten van briefing tot lancering, bewaak deadlines en analyseer resultaten met tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs. Mijn analytische aanpak en oog voor detail helpen me om campagnes continu te verbeteren.

Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met het vertalen van offline marketingboodschappen naar online kanalen, zoals social media en AI-zoekmachines. Ik werk graag samen met verschillende teams en communiceer vlot in het Nederlands, Engels en Turks.

Ik ben leergierig, resultaatgericht en klaar om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor uw klant. Ik kijk uit naar een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Marketing Officer position at VIVALDIS. Your client in Lummen, specialized in online wine sales, appeals to me greatly.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I independently execute marketing campaigns: from SEO optimization and content creation to building and managing WordPress sites. I coordinate projects from briefing to launch, monitor deadlines, and analyze results using tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs. My analytical approach and attention to detail help me continuously improve campaigns.

Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience translating offline marketing messages to online channels, such as social media and AI search engines. I enjoy collaborating with different teams and communicate fluently in Dutch, English, and Turkish.

I am eager to learn, results-driven, and ready to apply my skills for your client. I look forward to a conversation.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Marketingmedewerker bij VIVALDIS voor uw klant in Lummen, gespecialiseerd in de online verkoop van kwalitatieve wijnen. Uw oproep voor een zelfstandige, resultaatgerichte marketeer die campagnes van A tot Z beheert, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het opzetten en uitvoeren van commerciële marketingcampagnes. Ik bedenk contentstrategieën, voer SEO-optimalisaties uit en beheer de volledige projectcyclus: van briefing en planning tot lancering en evaluatie. Ik werk met tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs om campagneresultaten te analyseren en bij te sturen. Mijn ervaring met WordPress (Elementor, Astra) stelt me in staat om marketingboodschappen effectief te vertalen van offline naar online kanalen, zoals social media en de website.

Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com bewezen dat ik zelfstandig projecten kan opstarten en beheren. Ik implementeerde gestructureerde data en voerde technische SEO/GEO-audits uit om de zichtbaarheid te verbeteren. Deze ervaring heeft mijn analytische vaardigheden en oog voor detail versterkt.

Ik herken me in het profiel: ik ben organisatorisch sterk, neem initiatief en werk graag samen met interne experts. Ik communiceer vlot in het Nederlands (B1, in opleiding), Engels en Turks. Ik ben bereid om naar Hilversum te reizen voor overleg.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn kennis en energie in te zetten voor uw klant. Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Marketing Officer position at VIVALDIS for your client in Lummen, specialized in online sales of quality wines. Your call for an independent, results-driven marketer who manages campaigns from A to Z aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for setting up and executing commercial marketing campaigns. I devise content strategies, perform SEO optimizations, and manage the full project cycle: from briefing and planning to launch and evaluation. I use tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs to analyze campaign results and make adjustments. My experience with WordPress (Elementor, Astra) enables me to effectively translate marketing messages from offline to online channels, such as social media and the website.

Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I have proven that I can independently start and manage projects. I implemented structured data and conducted technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility. This experience has strengthened my analytical skills and attention to detail.

I recognize myself in the profile: I am organizationally strong, take initiative, and enjoy collaborating with internal experts. I communicate fluently in Dutch (B1, in training), English, and Turkish. I am willing to travel to Hilversum for meetings.

I look forward to applying my knowledge and energy for your client. I would be happy to explain my motivation in a conversation.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Full-cycle campaign coordination: from briefing and planning to launch and evaluation, with hands-on experience in SEO, content, and WordPress.
• Analytical and data-driven: uses Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console to monitor and optimize campaign performance.
• Proactive and self-reliant: independently manages projects (e.g., mirook.com) and takes initiative to spot commercial opportunities.
• Multilingual communicator: Dutch (B1, actively improving), English (professional), Turkish (native); comfortable in international teams.
• Collaborative team player: works closely with content, CRM, and category management teams to align marketing efforts.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Campaign coordination & project management: full-cycle campaign management from briefing to launch and evaluation, stakeholder coordination, deadline management
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
